name: 6pk Round Solar LED Outdoor Path Lights Matte Black - Room Essentials™: Weather-Resistant, Automatic Lighting, Integrated Bulb
description:
Garner compliments for your beautiful pathway with the 6-Pack Round Solar LED Outdoor Path Lights from Room Essentials™. Designed in a microphone-like shape, this pack of six matte-black path lights light up automatically for a glowing space. They can be hung or staked according to your needs, and are solar powered to help you save energy. Designed with integrated LED bulbs, these round path lights require six AA nickel metal hydride batteries.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
